name: serializable-broke
description: Un agent change le retour de sendEmailReport pour un `new BigPayload()`. Le retour est non-sérialisable → BREAK serializable.broke sur le client_call dashboard.html.

mutations.before_contains:
const id = generateId_();
  return { success: true, messageId: id };
mutations.after:
function BigPayload() { this.x = 1; }
  return new BigPayload();
